# Read the Pass Type Id Information of a Certificate | Apple Developer Documentation

- [ Enterprise Program API ](/documentation/enterpriseprogramapi)

- [ Read the Pass Type Id Information of a Certificate ](/documentation/EnterpriseProgramAPI/Read-the-Pass-Type-Id-Information-of-a-Certificate)

-  Read the Pass Type Id Information of a Certificate 

Web Service Endpoint# Read the Pass Type Id Information of a Certificate

## [URL](/documentation/EnterpriseProgramAPI/Read-the-Pass-Type-Id-Information-of-a-Certificate#url)



```
GET https://api.enterprise.developer.apple.com/v1/certificates/{id}/passTypeId
```

## [Path Parameters](/documentation/EnterpriseProgramAPI/Read-the-Pass-Type-Id-Information-of-a-Certificate#path-parameters)

`id``string` (Required) ## [Query Parameters](/documentation/EnterpriseProgramAPI/Read-the-Pass-Type-Id-Information-of-a-Certificate#query-parameters)

`fields[certificates]``[string]` Possible Values: `certificateContent, certificateType, csrContent, displayName, expirationDate, name, passTypeId, platform, serialNumber``fields[passTypeIds]``[string]` Possible Values: `certificates, identifier, name``include``[string]` Value: `certificates``limit[certificates]``integer` Maximum: `50`## [Response Codes](/documentation/EnterpriseProgramAPI/Read-the-Pass-Type-Id-Information-of-a-Certificate#response-codes)

` 200 OK``[PassTypeIdResponse`](/documentation/enterpriseprogramapi/passtypeidresponse)`OK` Content-Type: application/json ` 400 Bad Request``[ErrorResponse`](/documentation/enterpriseprogramapi/errorresponse)`Bad Request` Content-Type: application/json ` 401 Unauthorized``[ErrorResponse`](/documentation/enterpriseprogramapi/errorresponse)`Unauthorized` Content-Type: application/json ` 403 Forbidden``[ErrorResponse`](/documentation/enterpriseprogramapi/errorresponse)`Forbidden` Content-Type: application/json ` 404 Not Found``[ErrorResponse`](/documentation/enterpriseprogramapi/errorresponse)`Not Found` Content-Type: application/json
title: Read the Pass Type Id Information of a Certificate | Apple Developer Documentation
